name: UpdateValueParams
summary: This class encapsulates the input parameters that need to be passed into nodes when they are updated in the UI.

constructors.name: UpdateValueParams(string, string, ProtoCore.Namespace.ElementResolver)
constructors.signature: void UpdateValueParams(string propertyName, string propertyValue, ProtoCore.Namespace.ElementResolver elementResolver)

params.name: propertyName
params.doc: Name of the property whose value is to be updated. This parameter cannot be empty or null.

params.name: propertyValue
params.doc: Value of the named property whose value is to be updated. This parameter can either be null or empty if the targeted property allows such values.This value comes directly from DynamoTextBox after user commits it. Overridden methods then use a specific IValueConverter to turn this string into another data type that it expects.

properties.name: ElementResolver
properties.summary: Returns Dynamo.Graph.UpdateValueParams.ElementResolver object responsible for resolving class namespaces

properties.name: PropertyName
properties.summary: Returns name of the property whose value needs to be updated.

properties.name: PropertyValue
properties.summary: Returns string representation of value to update specified node property
